questionHtml:
Three gases in the atmosphere are

          I.     carbon dioxide (CO2)

          II.     dinitrogen monoxide (N2O)

          III.     oxygen (O2).

Which of these are considered to be greenhouse gases?

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: Three gases in the atmosphere are I. carbon dioxide (CO2) II. dinitrogen monoxide (N2O) III. oxygen (O2). Which of these are considered to be greenhouse gases? A. I and II only B.
